verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified that all agents converged on the same three candidates (Tunisia, Algeria, Morocco) and that the evidence was consistent with the Maghreb region. The judge noted the lack of a definitive shift but correctly selected Tunisia as the primary candidate based on the specific combination of features (Ficus nitida, white cubic architecture). The synthesis is sound but acknowledges the inherent ambiguity of the visual evidence.
